issues.description: The commit recorded for F-0.3 modifies registry test code instead of applying the required whitespace-only formatting to internal/config/config.go, internal/config/config_cloak_levers_test.go, and internal/watcher/diff/config_diff.go. `git show 9530f2a --name-only` lists only this file, so the requested deliverable was not implemented.

The handoff binds F-0.3 to commit `9530f2a...` and claims no whitespace PR was necessary, but the feature explicitly required a separate formatting-only commit/PR against dev. No PR metadata or formatting commit for the three target files is present.

blockingIssues.description: The recorded F-0.3 commit is an unrelated registry-test change, not the requested gofmt-only update for the three target files.
The submitted handoff explicitly says no formatting PR was needed, so the feature deliverable (single small PR with only formatting changes) was never produced.

codeReview.summary: F-0.3 was not implemented. The referenced commit 9530f2a changes only internal/registry/model_registry_safety_test.go, while recent history for the three requested files remains on the earlier Milestone A branch commits. The transcript/handoff switched from an initial gofmt attempt to a claim that no change was needed, so no formatting-only PR or commit was delivered.

issues.description: The commit attached to this feature changes registry clone-safety test logic/comments instead of touching the three files named in the feature description.
The handoff contradicts the feature contract by asserting that no whitespace drift PR was necessary; this leaves the required formatting-only deliverable absent.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The on-disk claude-cache-pr-worker skill exists and documents a fallback path, but the runtime Skill tool could not load it. That mismatch pushed the worker into ad-hoc execution and contributed to the incorrect handoff.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows `Error: Skill "claude-cache-pr-worker" not found`. The skill file at C:\Users\Janak Kalaria\.factory\skills\claude-cache-pr-worker\SKILL.md lines 124-129 defines a fallback procedure when the skill-loader fails.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance depends on `.factory/services.yaml`, but this checkout does not contain that file (`.factory` only has `validation/`). The missing manifest caused the worker to improvise baseline/test commands instead of following a shared source of truth.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md lines 31-44 say the baseline command comes from `.factory/services.yaml`. In the transcript skeleton, `Read G:\Droid.Claude\CLIProxyAPI\router-dev\.factory\services.yaml` failed with ENOENT, and `LS G:\Droid.Claude\CLIProxyAPI\router-dev\.factory` showed only `validation/`.

summary: Fail: the recorded F-0.3 commit is the unrelated F-0.2 registry-test fix, and no formatting-only commit/PR touched internal/config/config.go, internal/config/config_cloak_levers_test.go, or internal/watcher/diff/config_diff.go.
